title: Easy Chat
subtitle: Web App
description: Easy Chat is a web messenger built for people who want to talk to each other without installing yet another app that slowly consumes their phone storage like a digital parasite. It runs directly in the browser, which means it works on most devices as long as they can handle basic internet usage and the emotional weight of unread messages.

subtitle: 3D / Animation
description: Easy Park is a concept project centered around improving everyday parking frustrations through a simple, user-focused solution. The idea introduces a system that allows drivers to quickly identify and notify vehicle owners when their car is blocking access, using license plate recognition and instant alerts.\n\nThe project is presented through a short 3D animated trailer created in Blender, illustrating a real-world scenario where a driver is unable to leave a parking space and resolves the situation using the app. The concept also extends toward future features such as locating available parking spaces and optimizing urban parking flow.
